basic_details.job_title: Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Recruitment 2026: Belahi Dakshin Panchayat has released the official notification for 1 Vikas Mitra posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Bihar. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years

selection_process: Merit List based on Matric marks Objections Resolution Selection List Publication Document Verification Appointment
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Belahi Dakshin Panchayat to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Job 2026 Notification PDF

Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit List based on Matric marks Objections Resolution Selection List Publication Document Verification Appointment

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Belahi Dakshin Panchayat to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra recruitment is 11 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Vikas Mitra post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Vikas Mitra post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Vikas Mitra position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Vikas Mitra position is Matriculation or an equivalent examination from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat Vikas Mitra recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the Vikas Mitra post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Vikas Mitra post will be based on a merit list prepared from Matric marks, followed by objections resolution, selection list publication, document verification, and finally, appointment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Vikas Mitra post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Vikas Mitra post announced by the Belahi Dakshin Panchayat in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job for the Vikas Mitra position?
faq.answer: The job for the Vikas Mitra position is contractual in nature. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Jaynagar, Bihar. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this area.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Bihar apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Bihar. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for the Vikas Mitra post?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Vikas Mitra post are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive salary information.
